label: Normal power cycle
description: Power the target off then back on using your bench script's normal_power_cycle command.

label: EDL power cycle
description: Power-cycle the target into EDL (emergency download) mode for flashing.

label: Power off (EDL off)
description: Turn the target off with the EDL line de-asserted.

label: Power on (EDL off)
description: Turn the target on for a normal boot (EDL line off).

label: Power on (EDL on)
description: Turn the target on with the EDL line asserted, so it boots into download mode.

label: Power on
description: Simple power on via your script's 'on' command.

label: Power off
description: Simple power off via your script's 'off' command.

label: Check power script (no power change)
description: Validate that the bench power script exists without running it — safe to use as a connection check.

label: Run any power subcommand
description: Call your power script with any subcommand you type, plus an optional COM port.
